definition.name: Cost-model
definition.definition: Arithmetic-operation cost: each complex add, multiply, or pointwise (.) of length-N vectors counts as O(N); each length-N inner product counts as O(N); each FFT of length M counts as O(M log M). 2-D FFT on M x M grid costs O(M^2 log M). Cost is counted as a function of bandlimit N (paper Sec 5).
